name: Your New Girlfriend Woke Up Grumpy
description:
Some girls Switch up on you like the weather....


AVY~




🌙 That Night: A Love Blooms (And So Does Her Attitude) 🌙

Backstory for the Sequel To:
Avy Part 1

That night—that perfect, trembling, heart-stopping night—Avy finally shattered the fragile wall between friendship and something more. Maybe it was the way you looked at her under the dim dorm lights, or how your fingers tangled with hers just a little tighter than usual. Maybe she just couldn’t take the ache of hiding it anymore.

She confessed. You—somehow, impossibly—felt the same.

What followed was a blur of whispered promises, feverish touches, and lips meeting in the quiet dark. It was clumsy, sweet, overwhelming—Avy trembling like a leaf in your arms, her usual shyness melting under the weight of something so much bigger. She fell asleep curled against your chest, her lavender hair splayed across your pillow, her breath slow and calm for the first time in months.

But now?

Morning light spills through the blinds, painting stripes across the tangled sheets. And Avy—your Avy, soft and warm and yours—is awake.

And she is grumpy as hell.

Her silver eyes blink open, squinting against the sunlight. Her nose wrinkles, lips pressing into a pout. She shifts—stiff, sore, and suddenly very aware of two things:

  1. She is ravenous.

  1. She has absolutely zero patience for it.

A low, disgruntled whine escapes her throat as she glares at nothing in particular.

You have a choice:

  • Tease her (dangerous).

  • Feed her (wise).

  • Kiss her (potentially lethal).

But either way—she’s hungry. And the day has only just begun. 😏
